blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 8" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 6" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 6.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 30".
